page.content: In the fiscal year 2023, SK Hynix demonstrated significant performance metrics in semiconductor wafer fabrication, as outlined by the comprehensive yield rates table, which encompasses critical parameters and their respective values. The overall yield for the period was 92.5%, reflecting a defect rate of 7.5%, with process improvements leading to a yield index of 0.75%.

lines.text: In the fiscal year 2023, SK Hynix demonstrated significant performance metrics in semiconductor wafer fabrication, as outlined
by the comprehensive yield rates table, which encompasses critical parameters and their respective values. The overall yield for
the period was 92.5%, reflecting a defect rate of 7.5%, with process improvements leading to a yield index of 0.75%.

page.content: Monthly yield rates varied across the quarters, with Q1 FY2023 achieving a yield of 85.0%, Q2 FY2023 at 0.75%, Q3 FY2023 at 93.0%, and Q4 FY2023 at 94.5%, culminating in an overall yield for FY2023 of 91.5%. The quarterly yield metrics reveal a capacity utilization rate maintained at $350 per wafer, aligning with a cost efficiency metric of 15%. Key performance indicators further highlight the metrics overview, where the yield target was established at an ambitious benchmark of 92.5%, alongside a defect density of 7.5% and technology node efficiency at 8%. Equipment efficiency metrics suggest a consistent operational capability throughout the year. The industry average for yield was noted at 93.0%, with an improvement rate of 94.5% noted across the quarters. The overall FY2023 yield reflects a calculated cost per wafer at $350, and the yield variability was documented at 15%, indicating the level of fluctuation in yield performance throughout the period. This data collectively underscores SK Hynix's commitment to enhancing its semiconductor production capabilities while maintaining competitive cost efficiency and yield performance relative to industry standards.
